posts.title: The Future of AI: What's Coming in 2025
posts.excerpt: From autonomous agents to multimodal models, here's what the next generation of AI will bring.
posts.content:

Autonomous Agents

The next frontier is AI that can act on your behalf. These agents will book travel, manage schedules, and complete complex tasks with minimal supervision.

Multimodal Models

Models that can understand text, images, audio, and video simultaneously will become standard, enabling richer interactions.
